description_long: This house consists of three connected rectangular structures, each with two stories and flat roofs. The exterior walls are primarily a light gray or off-white color, with some sections featuring darker accents and visible window frames. The upper floors have open balcony-like areas with railings, and the windows are arranged in a mostly asymmetrical pattern. The buildings have a modern, utilitarian appearance, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on geometric forms. The ground floors feature multiple doorways and large window openings, suggesting easy access and natural light. The overall design is functional, with flat roofs that could potentially serve as terraces or additional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house complex with flat roofs, light-colored walls, and open balconies. The design is geometric and functional, with asymmetrical windows and minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing three connected buildings, each with two stories, flat roofs, and open balcony areas.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the structures and the alignment of windows and balconies along the length.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facades, with fewer windows and a more closed-off appearance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the staggered arrangement of the buildings and additional window placements.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple entryways with flat doors, minimal steps, and no prominent porch or decorative elements.
